title: French Galette with Piquant Tofu Filling
description: A twist on the classic French galette, this recipe features a flavorful piquant tofu filling, perfect for a satisfying vegetarian meal.

ingredients.name: Piquant
ingredients.notes: chopped, mixed pepper and onion blend

instructions: Roll out the galette sheet to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped piquant to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Crumb the tofu and add it to the pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly browned.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley and crumbled feta cheese over the tofu mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Brush the edges of the galette with the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Spoon the tofu filling onto one half of the galette, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the galette over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the galette with a little water and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until the crust is golden brown and the filling is heated through.
Let the galette rest for 5 minutes before serving.
